title: scaligeria meifolia
intro: Scaligeria meifolia is a plant species commonly known as Chinese angelica, however, it is sometimes referred to as Meifolia Scaligeria. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Scaligeria meifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Scaligeria meifolia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
